hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects scattered provider outputs into one structured workflow that reduces inconsistent reviews and strengthens audit trails for VASP compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented provider outputs that separate identity, transaction, and wallet risk data. This disconnect leads to duplicated checks, unclear policy enforcement, and difficulty maintaining a consistent audit trail across cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs, policy enforcement data, reviewer actions and evidence into a single workflow that reduces duplicated checks and strengthens audit trails for consistent compliance decisions.
workflow_title: From fragmented provider checks to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures outputs from multiple providers into rule-based reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support consistent compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Structured review control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects disparate provider outputs into unified workflows, preserving decisions and evidence to reduce inconsistent reviews and strengthen audit readiness for compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with governed provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to reduce inconsistent decisions and strengthen bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help reduce inconsistent compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows support consistent case decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves decision history across teams
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages fragmented provider outputs securely
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce inconsistent review decisions?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows applying internal policies, which reduces inconsistent reviews by connecting data, routing, and enforcing repeatable, auditable compliance decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates data from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one connected case and workflow platform to simplify review and reduce manual handoffs across systems.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence within workflows to enable audit readiness and support consistent compliance review across teams.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates into existing compliance stacks without replacing tools, connecting outputs into a controlled, governed workflow layer for operational consistency.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers and structures their outputs into workflows, but does not replace the providers themselves.
final_title: Connect provider outputs into consistent review workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures fragmented compliance data into connected cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for VASP operations.
